dataList.content: ... You may speak to me casually, Araya. But...
... in the presence of other Apprentices, perhaps you should find it preferable to mimic the tone of the Dihui Star.

dataList.title: The House of Spiders
dataList.content: ... C'mon. It's not like I wanted to be Dihui Star. Just lemme do whatever I want while I'm here.

dataList.title: The House of Spiders
dataList.content: So what's there... up the stairs?

dataList.title: The House of Spiders
dataList.content: Aren't you even a lil curious?
... Why bother peeling back the heavens to see what is beyond?
Those wanting of yearning needn't raise their heads skyward.
<... now we've got another reason to check what's upstairs.>
